## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Strapi's content marketing engagement with fwd.digital, addressing quality concerns and exploring future collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is implementing workflow V2 to improve content quality, especially for technical audiences](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Strapi is seeing initial traffic results (\~4,000 impressions, \~100 clicks) but seeks ROI justification](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Both parties aim to collaborate on innovative AI-driven content workflows and potential product integrations](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [In-person meeting planned during Next.js conference week (Oct 24) to discuss strategy with Strapi's leadership](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [fwd.digital acknowledges quality issues, especially for technical content](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Implementing workflow V2 with section-by-section research and larger output capacity (up to 10,000 words)](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Exploring creative inputs like podcasts and voice notes for better content generation](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Considering integration with Strapi's Kappa system for improved domain expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

### Traffic and ROI Discussion

  - [Initial results: \~4,000 impressions, \~100 clicks for Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Comparable client (D Graph) saw 4-5x traffic increase after 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Victor expresses concern about ROI justification for budget renewal](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Marcel emphasizes that positive ROI typically not seen until after 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)

### Strategy Adjustments

  - [Focus more on content refreshes for quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Consider shifting new content production to integration pages (lower quality threshold)](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Explore A/B testing at both product and marketing levels](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Investigate AI-driven workflows for site-wide content optimization (inspired by IBM.com approach)](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

### Collaboration and Future Plans

  - [In-person meeting planned during Next.js conference week (Oct 24) with Strapi's CEO, CPO, and CTO](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Explore potential product integrations and AI features for Strapi's 2025 roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
  - [Discuss hosting joint events, leveraging Marcel's new office space and CMO network](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Victor to coordinate meeting during Next.js conference week (Oct 24) with Strapi leadership](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Marcel to connect his CTO (Paul) with Strapi's dev rel/content lead (Paul Brodslabski)](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Explore implementation of voice note feedback system for more efficient content iteration](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Consider joint event opportunities, leveraging Marcel's new office and CMO network](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)
  - [fwd.digital to focus on improving technical content quality as top priority](https://fathom.video/share/Ln-HMA9k1tV4QRz3iEZcwyRBnF6EXyzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
